name: novel-reader
description: A clean Chinese novel reader with configurable local library storage.

scripts.test: node --import tsx --test src/lib/filename.test.ts src/lib/books.test.ts src/lib/text.test.ts src/lib/search-query.test.ts src/lib/admin-access.test.ts src/lib/content-index-db.test.ts src/lib/content-index.test.ts src/lib/date-time.test.ts src/lib/analytics.test.ts src/lib/rate-limit.test.ts src/lib/ip-rate-limit.test.ts src/lib/login-captcha.test.ts src/lib/site-icon.test.ts src/lib/site-settings.test.ts src/lib/password.test.ts
